messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- AES: growth archetype
- AMZN: growth archetype
- APD: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Amazon | E-commerce, Amazon Web Services, History, & Facts | Britannica Money - Britannica
    Summary: Amazon | E-commerce, Amazon Web Services, History, & Facts | Britannica Money Britannica

[1] Title: Air Products raised at BMO, citing strong environment and execution (APD:NYSE) - Seeking Alpha
    Summary: Air Products raised at BMO, citing strong environment and execution (APD:NYSE) Seeking Alpha

[2] Title: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on AES Corporation Stock? - Barchart.com
    Summary: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on AES Corporation Stock? Barchart.com

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Britannica encyclopedia page contains no investment-specific information, only general company history and facts."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["APD"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Analyst upgrade at BMO citing strong environment and execution provides relevant sentiment signal for the held APD position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AES"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Wall Street sentiment article provides relevant analyst perspective on the held AES position."
  }
]
```
